title: Trustpilot Company Reviews Scraper
description: Extract structured Trustpilot reviews for a company domain for review monitoring, reputation analysis, and competitor research.

company_domain.title: Company Domain
company_domain.description: Company domain with or without protocol, for example amazon.com or https://www.amazon.com.

locale.title: Locale
locale.description: Trustpilot locale used for the review page.

page.title: Start Page
page.description: First Trustpilot review page to fetch. Trustpilot limits public access to approximately the first 10 pages.

max_pages.title: Max Pages
max_pages.description: Number of pages to fetch in this run. Page plus Max Pages cannot go beyond page 10.

per_page.title: Reviews Per Page
per_page.description: Maximum reviews returned per page after Scrappa filtering.

sort.title: Sort
sort.description: Use recency for monitoring or relevance for representative samples.

rating.title: Rating Filter
rating.description: Comma-separated ratings from 1 to 5, for example 1,2 for negative-review monitoring or 4,5 for positive reviews.

with_replies.title: With Company Replies Only
with_replies.description: Only return reviews that include company replies.

query.title: Search Within Reviews
query.description: Keyword to search in review title or text, such as refund, delivery, support, or warranty.

fields.title: Fields
fields.description: Optional comma-separated Scrappa response fields to include. Leave empty for the full response.
